title: Registered Nurse/Senior Registered Nurse
description:
A boutique medical practice dedicated to serving a discerning global community of international and local patients, Osler Health delivers exceptional, personalised care with discretion and professionalism. Our nurses are at the heart of this promise — providing compassionate, skilled care while ensuring each patient’s experience is seamless, safe, and reassuring.

We are seeking an experienced Registered Nurse or Senior Registered Nurse who thrives in a collaborative, patient-focused environment. In this role, you will work closely with our doctors to deliver high-quality clinical care, manage procedures, and support patients throughout their healthcare journey.

Key Responsibilities

  •  Provide professional nursing care and clinical support to doctors during consultations and procedures

  •  Perform and record patient observations, including vital signs and health assessments

  •  Administer medications, dress wounds, and carry out other nursing procedures as required

  •  Educate patients and families on treatment plans, preventive care, and follow-up instructions

  • Manage infection control, ensure clinical areas are well-stocked, and maintain a safe, clean work environment

  •  Assist with patient scheduling, referrals, and related administrative tasks when required

  •  Handle patient interactions with warmth, professionalism, and discretion at all times

About You

  • Registered Nurse: At least 3 years post-registration nursing experience, preferably in a primary care, private practice, or specialist clinic environment.

  • Senior Registered Nurse: At least 5 years post-registration nursing experience, with proven leadership skills, mentoring experience, and the ability to guide junior team members.

  • Registered with the Singapore Nursing Board (SNB) and holding a valid practising certificate.

  • Strong clinical skills, a polished professional manner, and genuine compassion for patients.

  •  Proficient in electronic medical record (EMR) systems and comfortable with digital tools

  •  Highly organised, adaptable, and able to manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced setting

  •  Multi-lingual skills an advantage

Education & Credentials

  •  Diploma or Degree in Nursing from a recognised institution

  •  Current registration with the Singapore Nursing Board (SNB)

  •  Relevant certifications in Basic Cardiac Life Support (BCLS) / AED and other clinical competencies preferred

What We Offer

  •  Competitive salary and benefits

  •  Health insurance and paid time off

  •  Opportunities for professional growth, training, and development

  •  A supportive, collegial environment where your skills and contribution are valued

  •  The opportunity to work in a practice that places equal emphasis on clinical excellence and the patient experience 

If you take pride in your nursing practice and want to be part of a team that values both clinical skill and compassionate care, we would be delighted to hear from you.

To apply, please send your resume and a cover letter to people@osler-group.com.
We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
ETC Healthcare is the parent company of Osler Health International which currently has 2 clinics in Singapore, one at Raffles Hotel Arcade and another at the Star Vista.


Osler Health International is a famly practice offering primary healthcare services to adults, teenagers, children and babies. 


More information about Osler Health can be found at www.osler-health.com
